/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/SysLab_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/ui/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/src/processos.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/src/escalonador.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/src/memoria.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SysLab.dir/src/simulador.cpp.o -o SysLab  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
